name: Heavenly Chocolate Delight
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Ground Mexican cinnamon (or regular cinnamon)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine water, rice, cinnamon, and 1 teaspoon vanilla in a 2- to 3-quart saucepan.
2. Bring mixture to a boil; stir once or twice.
3. Reduce heat; cover and simmer for 15 minutes or until the rice is tender and liquid is absorbed.
4. Add milk, sugar, and chocolate to the rice mixture; simmer over low heat, stirring occasionally until thickened, about 30 minutes.
5. Soften gelatin in cold water.
6. Add softened gelatin to the thickened chocolate mixture. Stir well.
7. Remove from heat. Place pan with mixture in a bowl of ice water to cool.
8. Whip cream and remaining vanilla at low speed until soft peaks form. Increase speed to high and continue beating until stiff but not dry.
9. Fold half of whipped cream into the cooled rice mixture.
10. Add coffee liqueur to the remaining whipped cream.
11. Spoon rice mixture into dessert glasses; top with remaining whipped cream and sprinkle with chocolate sprinkles.
12. Refrigerate until set.
Recipe based on regular-milled long grain white rice. If using other types of rice, refer to a rice cooking chart.
